algorithmDebateRecord.dcterms:title: The Pros and Cons of Social Media Algorithms
algorithmDebateRecord.dcterms:creator: Danielle Draper
algorithmDebateRecord.dcterms:description: An explainer from the Bipartisan Policy Center that gives a high-level overview of benefits and limitations of social media algorithms.
algorithmDebateRecord.claim: Social media algorithms have benefits, including sorting data, ranking content, and supporting content moderation at a scale that would be difficult for humans.
Social media algorithms also have limitations and tradeoffs, including concerns about real-world harms and the challenges of maintaining safe digital environments.
algorithmDebateRecord.supportingEvidence: The source describes the document as a high-level overview of the benefits of social media algorithms while contrasting their limitations.
The source states that social media algorithms are used for sorting data, ranking content, and content moderation.
